home.noBlockedMessages: Protected region. No active threats detected in this sector.
home.verdictAiDesc: The neural engine identified linguistic patterns common in deceptive scam attempts and phishing bait.
home.verdictKeywordDesc: This message was silenced because it contains known spam indicators: {{keywords}}.

blocklist.title: Blocklist
blocklist.duplicateMessage: This keyword is already in your blocklist.
blocklist.rulesAppliedInstantly: Rules are applied instantly to all incoming traffic.

silenced.title: Silenced Numbers
silenced.description: Messages from these numbers will be silently ignored. You won't be notified.

activity.title: Categories
activity.subtitle: AI automatically categorizes your incoming messages.

aiSettings.title: Spam Neutralization
aiSettings.neuralDesc: Aegis uses local neural networks to automatically identify and block new spam patterns. Your communication data never leaves this device.
aiSettings.realTimeActive: Real-time filtering is actively protecting you.

settings.title: Preferences
settings.mustSetupPasscode: You must set up a device Passcode, PIN, or Biometrics in your phone's settings before you can enable App Lock.
settings.suppressDesc: Aegis needs permission to silence specific notifications from system apps.
settings.iosFilterDesc: Aegis can filter spam SMS directly into your 'Junk' folder. You must enable this in System Settings.
settings.clearAllDataDesc: Permanently erase all keywords, silenced numbers, and scan history.
settings.confirmClearMsg: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your custom settings and history will be lost.
settings.clearSuccessMsg: All local data has been successfully purged.

legal.privacyIntro: Your privacy is the core directive of Aegis OS. We built this system to ensure that your communication data remains under your absolute control.
legal.privacySection1Text: Aegis utilizes specialized on-device neural networks to analyze incoming traffic. Unlike traditional spam filters, your messages are never uploaded to a cloud server for classification. All intelligence happens within the secure enclave of your hardware.
legal.privacySection2Text: We do not maintain centralized databases of your contacts, message content, or metadata. Our architecture is designed for zero persistence outside of your local device storage.
legal.privacySection3Text: You have complete control over your blocklists and silenced numbers. This data is encrypted on-device and is never shared, sold, or accessible by third-party entities.
legal.termsIntro: By initializing Aegis OS, you agree to these operating parameters.
legal.termsSection1Text: Aegis grants you a personal, non-transferable license to use our neural silence engine for legitimate personal security purposes.
legal.termsSection2Text: While our AI provides elite-grade protection, no defensive system is absolute. Aegis is an assistant tool, and users should exercise independent judgment when interacting with unknown digital traffic.
legal.termsSection3Text: Any attempt to reverse engineer the neural silence engine or bypass integrated security protocols is strictly prohibited.
